div.p: The United Nations Security Council met from 3 to 6:15 p. m. on August 1; for the record, see U.N. document S/PV.480. The discussion related principally to the efforts of the President of the Council, Mr. Malik, to raise the question of the seating of a representative of the People’s Republic of China on the Security Council in place of the representative of the Republic of China.
